title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2026
summary:
Main
Today, Dalian iron ore futures traded with a slight upward trend. The main contract I2605 openedhigher and maintained high-level volatility, finally closing at 797 points, up 0.95% from the previous trading day. In terms of spot goods, traders are still active in shipping, steel mills are generally in the mood to purchase, and there are few enquiries.
